text:
/ci8 1 ピエロがうじゃうじゃと……
まるでサーカスだな、こりゃ。

/ci5 3 馬車の隙間に何か見える……
あれは、なんだろう？

/ci8 1 All these clowns, clowning
around...If I didn't know better,
I'd think we were at the circus.

/ci5 3 I see something between the carriages.
What is that?

ピエロがうじゃうじゃと……
まるでサーカスだな、こりゃ。

馬車の隙間に何か見える……
あれは、なんだろう？

All these clowns, clowning around...
If I didn't know better, I'd think we
were at the circus.

I see something between the carriages.
What is that?
